html:
The Mini Sign is a craftable Item located in the Structures Tab. 1 Board is used to craft 4 Mini Signs, requiring a Science Machine to prototype. By placing an item near a Mini Sign, the player can draw that item on it once by using a Feather Pencil.

Unlike other structures, Mini Signs cannot be destroyed with a Hammer to return their crafting resources, but can be dug up with any kind of Shovel. Digging them up will not remove images that have already been drawn on them.

Tips

  • Mini Signs can be used to sort Chests or other containers in the players' base, as they can be placed very close to them.

Trivia

  • Mini Signs were introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Herd Mentality update during A New Reign. They were later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.

Gallery

  • Mini Sign as seen in the poster for the Herd Mentality update.
  • Mini Signs used to sort several chests.
  • The prompt that appears while drawing a nearby item on a sign.
Craftable ItemsStructures

“I could draw better than that!”
–Wilson
“Haha oh man, who drew THAT?”
–Willow
“Tiny picture is worth many, tinier words.”
–Wolfgang
“Such a striking likeness...”
–Wendy
“THIS ART IS REPRESENTATIONAL”
–WX-78
“An excellent diagram! Very accurate.”
–Wickerbottom
“Is there anything wood can't do?”
–Woodie
“It was drawn in a steady hand.”
–Maxwell
“A wonderfully effective way to categorize my things.”
–Wagstaff
“The runes hath been drawn!”
–Wigfrid
“That looks nice!”
–Webber
“Nice drawing.”
–Walani
“Too small for a restaurant sign.”
–Warly
“A wee landmarker.”
–Woodlegs
“HATH THE PRETTY PICTURE”
–Wilba
“Pretty picture”
–Wormwood
“A sign. Always useful for organizing.”
–Wheeler
“Cutesy little drawing.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu, draw me next!”
–Wortox
“Oooh, pictures!”
–Wurt
“Who drew this?”
–Walter
“Someone obviously thought it was important enough to put on a sign.”
–Wanda
The Mini Sign is a craftable Item located in the Structures Tab. 1 Board is used to craft 4 Mini Signs, requiring a Science Machine to prototype. By placing an item near a Mini Sign, the player can draw that item on it once by using a Feather Pencil.
Unlike other structures, Mini Signs cannot be destroyed with a Hammer to return their crafting resources, but can be dug up with any kind of Shovel. Digging them up will not remove images that have already been drawn on them.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Mini Signs can be used to sort Chests or other containers in the players' base, as they can be placed very close to them.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Mini Signs were introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Herd Mentality update during A New Reign. They were later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
Gallery[edit | edit source]

Mini Signs used to sort several chests.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Biển Hiệu Mini là một Vật Phẩm có thể chế tạo được nằm trong Thẻ Cấu Trúc. 1 Bảng được sử dụng để chế tạo 4 Biển hiệu Nhỏ, yêu cầu Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Bằng cách đặt một vật phẩm gần Biển hiệu Mini, người chơi có thể vẽ vật phẩm đó lên đó một lần bằng cách sử dụng Bút lông vũ.

The '''Mini Sign''' is a craftable [[Item]] located in the [[Structures Tab]]. 1 [[Boards|Board]] is used to craft 4 Mini Signs, requiring a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. By placing an item near a Mini Sign, the player can draw that item on it once by using a [[Feather Pencil]].

Unlike other structures, Mini Signs cannot be destroyed with a [[Hammer]] to return their crafting resources, but can be dug up with any kind of [[Shovel]]. Digging them up will not remove images that have already been drawn on them.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == 
* Mini Signs can be used to sort [[Chest]]s or other containers in the players' base, as they can be placed very close to them.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Mini Signs were introduced to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' in the ''[[A New Reign#November 24, 2016 - Herd Mentality|Herd Mentality]]'' update during ''[[A New Reign]]''. They were later added to ''[[Don't Starve]]'' in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update.
